evidence_chain.claim: Cloud adoption in FinTech growing 35% YoY
Migration to cloud reduces infra cost by 40%
Cloud enables faster time-to-market for new features
Phased migration with non-critical workloads first reduces risk
Analysis is sound but cost projection for year 2-3 needs refinement
